commands.repair_reason: The remaining action is contributor real-behavior proof plus explicit maintainer review for protected migration/provider behavior, not an automated code repair.; Cleared: The diff only touches TypeScript migration plumbing and focused tests; it does not add dependencies, workflows, permissions, lifecycle hooks, downloaded code, or new secret-handling surfaces. (sha=02020a4098e499b6613ccfbf64ed1b8c6c3963cb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes migration option plumbing to build Codex-only provider options from the resolved migration provider id and adds focused builder/apply-path tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: call `runMigrationApply` with `providerId: "codex"`, Codex-only options such as `configPatchMode`, and no raw `opts.provider`; current main builds no provider options for that context. I did not execute it because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is contributor real-behavior proof plus explicit maintainer review for protected migration/provider behavior, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(migrate): use resolved provider for options
target.body:
## Summary
- build migration provider options from the resolved provider id
- pass the resolved provider id through migration apply preflight and apply contexts
- add provider-options coverage for defaulted Codex migrations with Codex-only options

Fixes #83285.

## Real behavior proof

![PR 83323 before/after proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-83323-fresh/pr-83323/pr-83323-fix-migrate-use-resolved-provider-for-options-before-after-proof.png)

Fresh deterministic proof artifacts:
- Summary: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-83323-fresh/pr-83323/summary.txt
- Before/source proof log: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-83323-fresh/pr-83323/before-source-proof.log
- After/PR proof log: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-83323-fresh/pr-83323/after-pr-83323.log

Behavior addressed: Codex-specific migration options should be included even when the provider defaults to Codex instead of being explicitly supplied in raw CLI opts.
Real environment tested: WSL Ubuntu OpenClaw source checkout at PR head `02020a4098` on branch `tmp-pr-83323-proof`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run src/commands/migrate/providers.test.ts src/commands/migrate/apply.test.ts --reporter=dot`.
Evidence after fix:

```text
RUN  v4.1.6 /root/src/openclaw-branches/fix-migrate-provider-options-83285

✓ commands  ../../src/commands/migrate/providers.test.ts (2 tests)\n✓ commands  ../../src/commands/migrate/apply.test.ts (1 test)

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  2 passed (2)

[check:changed] src/commands/migrate/apply.ts: core production
[check:changed] src/commands/migrate/providers.test.ts: core test
[check:changed] src/commands/migrate/providers.ts: core production
Import cycle check: 0 runtime value cycle(s).
```

Observed result after fix: `buildMigrationProviderOptions({ configPatchMode: "return", verifyPluginApps: true }, "codex")` returns both Codex-only options even when `opts.provider` is omitted, and `runMigrationApply` forwards those options into both the preflight `plan` context and final `apply` context.
What was not tested: a live migration against an actual Codex workspace; this proof exercises the embedded/defaulted apply path with a real `runMigrationApply` call and a test migration provider.
- Before evidence (terminal/code capture from `origin/main`):

```text
src/commands/migrate/providers.ts before this patch checked only raw opts.provider:
  if (opts.provider === "codex" && opts.verifyPluginApps === true) { ... }
  if (opts.provider === "codex" && opts.configPatchMode) { ... }

src/commands/migrate/apply.ts called:
  providerOptions: buildMigrationProviderOptions(params.opts)

When the apply path had resolved providerId="codex" but opts.provider was undefined, Codex-only providerOptions were omitted.
```

## Root Cause
- Root cause: provider option construction used the raw optional CLI provider field rather than the provider id already resolved by the migrate command.
- Missing detection / guardrail: no focused coverage for defaulted Codex migrations carrying Codex-only options.
- Contributing context: `createMigrationPlan` requires `opts.provider`, but `runMigrationApply` receives `providerId` separately while `opts.provider` can remain undefined.

## Regression Test Plan
- Coverage level that should have caught this: unit test.
- Target tests or files: `src/commands/migrate/providers.test.ts`, `src/commands/migrate/apply.test.ts`.
- Scenario the test should lock in: Codex-only provider options are built from the resolved provider id, omitted for other providers, and forwarded into the apply path when raw `opts.provider` is absent.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: the bug is isolated to provider option construction and apply-path plumbing.

## Validation
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/migrate/providers.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
